## What changed

Describe the focused change.

## Why

Explain the audit, safety, portability or quality problem addressed.

## User impact

Describe how auditors, developers or release owners benefit.

## Validation

- [ ] `SKILL.md` frontmatter remains valid.
- [ ] Required relative links resolve.
- [ ] JSON assets parse.
- [ ] Python helpers compile and relevant scripts were exercised.
- [ ] No credentials, tokens or private data are included.
- [ ] New checks define pass, fail, blocked and not-applicable behavior.
- [ ] Recommendations include validation and regression guidance.
- [ ] Testing remains authorized and non-destructive by default.
- [ ] README and changelog were updated where needed.

## Evidence

List commands, screenshots, examples or generated artifacts used to validate the change.

## Safety and compatibility

Describe permission changes, new tools, platform dependencies, schema changes, migration needs or known limitations.
